data.title: Stora Enso updates comparative figures following changes to segment reporting
data.description: On March 25, 2026, Stora Enso Oyj announced a change in its segment reporting starting from January 1, 2026. The Group restated comparative figures for its segment reporting for 2025. The adjustments were made to enhance transparency and accuracy in financial reporting. This modification impacts the way financial information is presented to stakeholders. Stora Enso aims to provide a clearer picture of its performance across different business segments. This change reflects the company's commitment to upholding high standards of corporate governance.

data.title: atNorth Heat Reuse Partnership with Kesko Goes Live, Delivering Recycled Data Center Heat to Finnish Retail Store
data.description: In Helsinki on March 25, 2026, atNorth, a top Nordic provider of high-density colocation and built-to-suit data centers, revealed that its collaboration with Kesko Corporation on heat reuse became operational in November 2025. This initiative involves utilizing waste heat generated at atNorth's FIN02 facility.

data.title: MirZyme Appoints Lindsey Carnett as U.S. Global Ambassador for Women's Health Innovation
data.description: In Birmingham, UK on March 25, 2026, MirZyme Therapeutics, a biotech firm dedicated to improving maternal health, revealed the selection of Lindsey Carnett, CEO of Marketing Maven Public Relations, Inc., as their Global Ambassador.

data.title: Zhihu Inc. Reports Unaudited Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: Zhihu Inc., a prominent online content community in China, recently disclosed its unaudited financial performance for the quarter and fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2025. Traded under the tickers ZH on NYSE and 2390 on HKEX, the company shared the update from Beijing, China, on March 25, 2026.

data.title: Thane judge grants bail to CoinDCX founders Sumit Gupta and Niraj Khandelwal, no case of fraud found against them.
data.description: Two co-founders of CoinDCX, Sumit Surendra Gupta and Niraj Ashok Khandelwal, were granted bail by a judge in Thane as no case was found against them.

data.title: Top States for Business (2026): Registered Agents Inc Identifies Growth Leaders in Monthly Economic Update by Better Business Advice
data.description: In the United States, the creation of new businesses continues to serve as a key indicator of economic vitality. According to a recent report from Registered Agents Inc, analyzed by Better Business Advice, it is evident that new business formation is a significant factor in gauging economic growth. The latest Business Formation Report reveals crucial insights into this aspect of the economy, pointing towards an upward trend in entrepreneurial endeavors. This data underscores the importance of tracking new business ventures, with fresh entrepreneurial initiatives contributing to economic momentum.

data.title: RELEX Report: AI Moves Into Core Supply Chain Decisions as Volatility Persists
data.description: A recent study conducted by RELEX reveals that 50% of businesses are committing resources to AI-powered inventory and supply chain optimization. This investment comes as companies revise their planning protocols to account for enduring market uncertainty. The findings were presented in the State of Supply Chain 2026 report by RELEX Solutions.

data.title: CNCF Celebrates Innovators Advancing Cloud Native at KubeCon + CloudNativeCon Europe
data.description: Individuals who have made significant contributions to the cloud native ecosystem and community were honored with the CNCF Community Awards at KubeCon + CloudNativeCon Europe 2026. This event saw the announcement of the winners, celebrating their exceptional work across various projects and Technical fields. The awards highlight the dedication and impact of recipients on the community, showcasing their valuable efforts in advancing the cloud native space.

data.title: Bitcoin may hit $75K by April 2026 amid technical consolidation. Key resistance at $73,175 may spark next rally.
data.description: Bitcoin is on track for a potential breakout towards $75,000, with current momentum placing it at $71,356. Technical indicators suggest neutral conditions at this point, with a crucial resistance level at $73,175 that could kickstart the next rally phase by April 2026.
